prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 41 名，近年排名稳定在 40–43 名区间，属顶尖 211 院校；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及历史实验室安全事件，但非近期高频负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 45 位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度尚可；未见明显投档断档记录；系统科学 A+、交通运输工程 A、信息与通信工程 A、计算机科学与技术 A-、土木工程 A-、管理科学与工程 A-；其中计算机类、电子信息类、交通运输类等招生专业与优势学科高度匹配，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类 2024–2026 年社会热度持续高热推荐，电子信息/通信为高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，均为该校核心招生方向；安徽省 2026 年普通高考总人数 451000 人，较 2025 年（物理类 320779+历史类 141400=462179）略有下降，竞争压力略减；北京交通大学位于北京，对安徽考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在安徽招生人数占全 国总招生比例约 4%–5%，非主要生源省，招生规模相对稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅回升至 7739 的强势表现、2026 年计划微缩 2 人、优势学科（计算机/电子信息/交通运输）持续高热、以及安徽省考生总数略有下降，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次在 7739 附近小幅波动，整体竞争格局基本稳定；预测最低位次约 7700 名，区间 7400–7900 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rank for Physics Category was approximately 9065→8913→7990→13361→7739. In 2024, due to the first year of the new Gaokao with subject selection adjustments, the rank significantly dropped to 13361, but quickly rebounded to 7739 in 2025, indicating a clear recovery in competition intensity for this university among Anhui Physics Category examinees. The baseline in 2025 is about rank 7739. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 106→114→113→116→126, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 124 students, a slight reduction of 2 compared to 2025, indicating a slight slowdown in expansion, with minimal impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science Main Ranking 2026 approximately 41st, with recent years stable in the 40–43 range, belonging to top 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving historical laboratory safety incidents, but not recent high-frequency negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking 45th (relatively hot), short video exposure medium to high, application attention acceptable. No obvious file-dropping records. System Science A+, Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-. Among them, Computer, Electronic Information, Transportation and other enrollment majors are highly matched with advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer category from 2024 to 2026 has sustained high social popularity and recommendation, Electronics/Communication is high popularity recommendation, Electrical Engineering and Automation is high popularity recommendation, all are core enrollment directions of this university. The total number of ordinary Gaokao examinees in Anhui Province in 2026 is 451,000, a slight decrease from 2025 (Physics Category 320,779 + History Category 141,400 = 462,179), slightly reducing competition pressure. Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional attraction for Anhui examinees. The number of students enrolled in Anhui accounts for about 4%–5% of the national total enrollment, not a major source province, and the enrollment scale is relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong performance of the rank rebounding to 7739 in 2025, the slight reduction of 2 in the 2026 plan, the sustained high popularity of advantageous disciplines (Computer/Electronic Information/Transportation), and the slight decrease in the total number of examinees in Anhui Province, it is expected that the minimum rank for Physics Category in 2026 will fluctuate slightly around 7739, with the overall competition pattern basically stable. Predicted minimum rank approximately 7700, range 7400–7900.

If your rank is significantly better than 7400, you can focus on aiming for the Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class and the flagship Computer Category major.
